_publications._publicationTitle: Inhibition of YAP/TAZ-driven TEAD activity prevents growth of NF2-null schwannoma and meningioma.

_contextSnippet: successful knockdown of YAP or TAZ was confirmed by western blot. In these experiments, however, while knockdown of TAZ did not affect YAP expression, knockdown of YAP did reduce TAZ in primary schwannoma cells
details: Successfully knocked down TAZ in primary schwannoma cells and reduced ALDH1A1 expression, without affecting YAP expression
